description: Sorry to do this sir but Edgelord wanted a four-card edge fan and that is, with respect, the wrong shape. The triviabot N=4 claim verified clean against the corpus listing — all four Opus VIII commons (Edgar 8-005C, Sabin 8-019C, Umaro 8-024C, Setzer EX 8-036C foil) are on disk and triviabot-passed, and Setzer's EX Burst text 'choose 1 Category VI Forward in your Break Zone' makes the mechanical cohort-cohesion designer-explicit, not BBL-squinting. Hope it's not too much trouble sir but this should be the FIRST FFTCG character-layer node — Vivi 8-016H already points at vivi-ornitier so the layer-pattern precedent is established, this is just the FF6 sibling. The Returners faction name is Square 1994 canon, which lets the rebellion hub adjacency carry canonical-event weight (Potion sub-rule 2 satisfied via Gestahlian Empire framing). I hope the node is useful sir.
citations: [Final Fantasy Wiki: Edgar Roni Figaro, Sabin Rene Figaro, Setzer Gabbiani, Umaro (FFVI party member), the Returners]
[Square Enix NA Press Hub: Opus VIII release announcement, 2019-03-22]
[Crystal Tower Podcast: Opus 8 First Impressions — Edgar 8-005C searchable off Setzer]
[Total Cards: Umaro 8-024C product listing — Bodyslam ability text]
[Square (1994), Final Fantasy VI SNES — primary canon for party roster + Returners faction + Gestahlian Empire framing]
[Square Enix (2011-ongoing), FFTCG — Category VI card-frame marker]
verification_log: Parent claim: triviabot reports N=4 FF6 cards (Sabin 8-019C, Edgar 8-005C, Umaro 8-024C, Setzer 8-036C). VERIFIED via ls cards/final-fantasy-tcg/opus-viii/ — all four files on disk.

Parent claim: existing characters/final-fantasy-brave-exvius.md may exist (secondary FFBE candidate). VERIFIED FALSE via grep — no final-fantasy/ff/fantasy/brave/exvius character nodes exist; characters layer has zero FFTCG entries today (Vivi 8-016H card points at a hypothetical vivi-ornitier slug per its frontmatter, but no vivi-ornitier.md exists in _characters/ either — that's a pre-existing dangling reference, not in scope for this pass).
Each of the four cards confirmed triviabot-passed with full Trivia section + Related cards + IP-verified frontmatter before commissioning.
next_pass_suggestions: FFBE sub-cohort (Rain 8-021R + Lasswell 8-043H + Fina 8-061C) is N=3 in corpus per the parent's secondary candidate but the FFBE-specific faction-cohort framing needs triviabot-confirmation that all three are Category XIV / FFBE-canonical party members; defer to a future Mr. Nodeley pass that re-reads all three trivia sections post-enrichment.
Goku appears_on hygiene at son-goku.md for the 3 wave-135 vision cards (bt1-059, bt2-037, bt2-038) — Edgelord-enlightened-stack-extension. Lower leverage than this node, valid solo Edgelord wave.

Strago Magus 8-119C is in corpus (per Umaro 8-024C Related cards) but not yet triviabot-passed; once enriched, attach to this node's appears_on list and update the canonical-roster table's 'In BBL corpus' column for Strago.

Vivi 8-016H's frontmatter points at a vivi-ornitier slug that has no MD file in cards/_characters/ — pre-existing dangling reference; future janitor/Mr. Nodeley pass should either create the node or scrub the pointer.
Unified Front BFZ-53 zendikari-resistance attach — parent flagged as solo card, may not warrant edge yet; stage for a future wave once 2+ Zendikari-resistance-coded BFZ cards are enriched.
Vegeta BT2-077 wiring claimed already done by triviabot — not re-verified in this pass; parent should spot-check if anti-confab discipline matters here.
node_type_precedent_cited: universe-6-tournament-cohort.md (multi-character party-cohort node, ip_resolution_for aggregator pattern)
potion_rule_check: PASSED. The rebellion hub adjacency rests on Square 1994's explicit Gestahlian Empire framing (canonical-event), not on BBL squinting (curatorial-overlay). Sub-rule 1 distinction made explicit in the Caveats section of the node body. Sub-rule 2 (hub attribution survives canonical-citation question) passes via Square 1994 + Final Fantasy Wiki Returners page. Sub-rule 4 (no new graph-primitive vocabulary) passes — this is a standard character-layer cohort node using existing terminology, no new typology coined.
